Farmhand Contact

Farmhand

Working on organic farms around the world has given me a unique perspective on food production and sustainability.

From New Zealand to Italy, I've experienced different farming methods, seasonal variations, and cultural approaches to agriculture.

Experience includes:

  • Organic vegetable farming
  • Animal husbandry
  • Permaculture design
  • Sustainable farming practices
  • Traditional farming methods
